blockedAssertions.blockedBy: No native AWQ model available. Downloaded model from QuantTrio/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ is GPTQ format (has qzeros tensors). AWQ format requires zero-point=0 (no qzeros).
Cannot measure AWQ throughput without native AWQ model. AWQ kernel with GPTQ weights produces incorrect results (GPTQ weights have non-zero zero points).
Cannot verify AWQ correctness without native AWQ model. Cosine sim test failed (min=0.147) when using AWQ kernel with GPTQ weights.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that downloaded 'AWQ' model from QuantTrio/Qwen3.5-27B-AWQ is actually GPTQ format. True AWQ model not currently available on HuggingFace for Qwen 3.5 27B.

modelFormatAnalysis.conclusion: Downloaded model is GPTQ format, not AWQ

bench_tp4_awq.py.failure: Memory access fault during TP=4 AWQ warmup

recommendations: Find or create a true AWQ-quantized Qwen 3.5 27B model (no qzeros tensor)
Consider using Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct-AWQ as an alternative model for AWQ testing
Update download script to verify model format after download
Add format validation in AWQWeightLoader to fail early if GPTQ format detected
